methods.description: Process for collecting sediment samples from boreal and tropical lakes to study surface water characteristics and sediment composition.

steps.description: Sediment cores were collected with plexiglass tubes in the littoral or sub-littoral zones at depths of 1-3 m.
steps.searchable_summary: collect sediment cores using plexiglass tubes at specified depths

steps.description: Lake bottom water was sampled in plastic carboys for later use during incubations.
steps.searchable_summary: sample lake bottom water using plastic carboys

steps.description: The sediment cores from each lake were transported to the laboratory with care to avoid re-suspension and to keep the sediment structure intact.
steps.searchable_summary: transport sediment cores to laboratory without disturbing structure
